title: Simple Voice Chat Dark Theme
description: A dark theme for the GUI and Icons of the mod "Simple Voice Chat"
body:
## A dark theme for the [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) mod's GUI with matching icons.

This pack's windows are darker than ever, and it includes a few icon replacements to make their usage a little more clear, mainly the whispering icons.

The dark UI option in [Vanilla Tweaks' Pack Builder](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) is recommended too.

---

![dark window with icon layout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b37b19393760fa7dde2ccf5ad452d6046db130.png)

Check out the [image gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-voice-chat-dark-theme/gallery) for more images!

---

Check out the [transparent verion](https://modrinth.com/project/simple-voice-chat-transparent-theme) of this pack as well.
